text: Upgrade Gemini API tier for image generation
description:
Current quota: 0 (free tier exhausted)
All image generation fails → "IMAGE GENERATION FAILED" text files

Solution: Upgrade to Gemini Pro paid tier
Cost: ~$0.04/image
Alternative: Switch to DALL-E 3 or Stable Diffusion

Quick win: ~30 min setup + payment
Impact: Enables visual content for Instagram/Twitter

status.comment: Blocked by Gemini API quota - needs human to upgrade tier - see supporting aim 602128b3
